cause_analysis.narrative: SkinEthics Medspa churned on 2026-02-13 after 293 days with Zoca. Sentiment turned negative on 2026-01-16 (app_chat) — first complaint keyword: "not seeing". Classification: service complaint. Negative signals appeared but no explicit cancellation request.
recommendations: [Escalation] First negative sentiment on 2026-01-16 via app_chat. Triggering a same-day AM touchpoint on any negative keyword would have caught this.
[Sentiment] Add an automated sentiment alerting layer over app_chat/email that pages the AM when negative keywords appear.

messages.body: Hi, thank you for calling SkinEthics. We are unavailable to answer the call at this time. Please leave a detailed message and we will get back to you as soon as we can. Thank you and have a great day.
Hey Delilah, I am so sorry for the delayed response.  I will have a word with my Client Experience Head and keep you posted the first thing tomorrow morning.
Hi, any updates on removing yourself from our website.

Hello Delilah, Goodmorning!  I hope you have been fine! Yes, I had a word with my Client Experience Head, and we have off boarded your account.  That said, you are always welcome back. Whenever you'd like to reconnect, feel free to reach out to me at kanak.s@zoca.com or +1 9783125094.
I wish you the very best in all your business pursuits going forward.
Hello! Hope all is well. We have requested to cancel service numerous times and still have yet to be cancelled.

I'm not here to pressure you or change your mind. I just want to make sure you have the full picture before making a final call. I hear you that the return hasn't matched what you've invested, and that's something I take seriously.
Please cancel our subscription and remove yourself from our website.
Hey Delilah, How have you been?
I've sent the report over to info@skinethicsmedspa.com. Once you've had a chance to look it over, let me know a good time to connect by phone or Google Meet and we can go through everything together.

If you're open to it, I'd like to offer you a reduced rate of just $150 a month for the next two months. That way, we can continue building on the momentum we've already started and work toward getting you the results you deserve, at a fraction of the cost. It would be a chance for us to prove our value without the sam…

Delilah, I completely understand where you're coming from, and I respect your decision. Before we part ways, I'd love for you to take a quick look at the report so you can see the progress we've made on your behalf.

Good Morning Delilah, Happy Wednesday!  We're halfway through the week already! Hope your books are looking good and your clients are leaving happy. Keep up the great work, and if there's anything I can help with, I'm just a text away.  Have a productive rest of the week!

Hi, thank you for calling Skenex. How can I help you? Hi, am I talking to Delilah? Delilah, yes. Can I help you? Hi, I'm so sorry to pronounce your name wrong, Delilah. This is Kanak from Zoka. Is this a good time to talk? What time is it? 3.30? Yeah, a client's about to walk in, so no. What is this about? I thought th…
All right, thank you for calling Skin Ethics, how can I help you?
Hello Delilah, Good Morning!  How have you been?
Thank you for calling Skin Ethic. We are unavailable to answer the call at this time.

One thing I keep coming back to is this - reviews matter far more today than they did even a few years ago. Earlier, star ratings were the whol…

I am really sorry to hear that you would like to discontinue. We truly value you and your business, and we would appreciate it if you could help us understand the reason behind this decision. Your feedback helps us improve and ensures we close things in a way that supports your business long-term.
